channel.title: Links :: FAU Cyber Security Club
channel.description: USEFUL LINKS Guide on all things Cyber https://github.com/Berkanktk/CyberSecurity?tab=readme-ov-file#links ACTIVE CLUB REPOS Repo for this wiki https://github.com/dxcently/fau-cyber-security-club-wiki ARCHIVED CLUB REPOS 2026 eMERGE Project Scalpel Hackathon - Cowrie Honeypot with Hybrid Edge AI
